## nsc vault set

Update an existing secret in the vault.

```
nsc vault set [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --from_file string            Load the file contents as the secret value.
  -h, --help                        help for set
      --if-version-matches string   Only update if the object version matches this value
      --object_id string            The object to update.
  -o, --output string               Output format: table, json (default "table")
```
